main.description: A project — a long-running community that runs recurring rounds, where members independently respond to a shared subject and converge to share. Examples: a song-cover collective (EPTSS Cover), a book club, a recipe challenge, an art-prompt circle.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Conventionally used as the record key.

description.description: What this community is and does, in one paragraph.

subjectKind.description: Default kind of subject this project's rounds work with — 'song', 'book', 'recipe', 'theme', etc. Lets clients render appropriate UI without inspecting individual subjects. Free-form to allow new community types.
